inputs.label: Investment Amount
inputs.businessContext: Amount invested in the convertible note.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount invested in the convertible note.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Discount applied to next round price per share.

businessContext_i18n.en: Discount applied to next round price per share.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir sonraki tur hisse başına fiyatına uygulanan iskonto.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rabatt auf den Aktienkurs der nächsten Runde.

inputs.label: Valuation Cap
inputs.businessContext: Maximum company valuation for conversion price cap.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum company valuation for conversion price cap.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm fiyatı tavanı için maksimum şirket değerlemesi.

inputs.label: Next Round Price Per Share
inputs.businessContext: Price per share in the qualified financing round.

businessContext_i18n.en: Price per share in the qualified financing round.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nitelikli finansman turunda hisse başına fiyat.

inputs.label: Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual simple interest rate accrued on the note.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual simple interest rate accrued on the note.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Senede tahakkuk eden yıllık basit faiz oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher einfacher Zinssatz, der auf die Anleihe anfällt.

inputs.label: Maturity
inputs.businessContext: Time until conversion, used to calculate accrued interest.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time until conversion, used to calculate accrued interest.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüme kadar geçen süre, tahakkuk eden faizi hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit bis zur Umwandlung, zur Berechnung der aufgelaufenen Zinsen.

inputs.label: Pre-Money Fully Diluted Shares
inputs.businessContext: Number of fully diluted shares before the next round.

label_i18n.tr: Para Öncesi Tam Seyreltilmiş Hisse Sayısı

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of fully diluted shares before the next round.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir sonraki tur öncesi tam seyreltilmiş hisse sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der voll verwässerten Aktien vor der nächsten Runde.
